title: [FIRRTL] Analog wires can go wrong on 'LowerSignatures' pass

features.name: analog inside nested flipped bundle on module port
features.description: Code should include a module with an output port containing a nested bundle where an analog type exists inside a flip-reversed sub-bundle, which causes LowerSignatures pass to incorrectly attempt connecting analog types
features.snippet:
module Inner(output auto : { flip in : { PAD : Analog<1>}});
endmodule

features.name: module instantiation with analog bundle port
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the instance port is a bundle type containing analog, and LowerSignatures incorrectly generates matchingconnect on the analog type

features.name: firrtl wire with flip containing analog bundle
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL wire declaration with a flip direction containing a bundle with analog type, which LowerSignatures incorrectly tries to connect
features.snippet: wire auto : { in flip : { PAD : Analog<1>}}
